calendar.matters:
JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Newton Lam, Clerk: Annie Pascual. Proceedings reported by:Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR 5229.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Aralon Properties.
Witness Michael Ware sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
Kristin Messer on behalf of Defendant, Defendant Renite Hernandez is NOT present.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant(s) as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises.

Total Judgment of $1405.57

Plaintiff to submit a form of Judgment.

CONTINUANCE CALENDAR FOR UD JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Continued To Nov-29-16 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 15
Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Aralon Properties is present. Represented by Michael Ware.
Attorney Daniel Cheung for the plaintiff.
Defendant Esteban Hernandez is present.
Attorney Fred Herold appearing for defendant in limited scope.
Spanish Court Interpreter Ellen Rosenthal is present.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of November 21, 2016 remains on calendar. (501)
